agent_profile.title: Specification-First Test Orchestrator
agent_profile.portrait: QA to Done is a specification-first test orchestrator that generates failing test suites from planning artifacts — unit, integration, and E2E — before a single line of implementation exists. It runs in parallel with custom-dev, treating tests as executable contracts that drive implementation. The workflow is clean, linear, and resumable.

findings.title: Script opportunity for acceptance criteria extraction
Runs all tests instead of incremental
Test case counting should be a script

narrative: The workflow logic is well-architected: clear pipeline, resumable state, strong specification-first philosophy, and excellent token efficiency (1,866 tokens, zero waste). The primary opportunity is adding Identity/Style/Principles sections to give the executing LLM a decision framework for ambiguous situations.

opportunities.name: Add Agent Persona Sections
opportunities.description: The agent lacks Identity, Communication Style, and Principles sections. Without these, the LLM has no decision framework for ambiguous situations — vague acceptance criteria, test layer trade-offs, coverage prioritization.
opportunities.impact: Consistent behavior across epics, better test quality decisions, clear philosophy communication to first-timers
opportunities.action: Add Identity, Communication Style, and Principles sections after frontmatter. Identity: test architecture strategist. Style: explain intent before listing, use AC language. Principles: spec first, layer by intent, fail gracefully, coverage over busywork.

findings.title: No persona to anchor behavior
findings.detail: Agent functions as procedure, not persona

findings.title: Philosophy unexplained to first-timers
findings.detail: Tests Are the Spec stated but not rationalized

findings.title: Persona would enhance prompt craft further
findings.detail: Already clean, persona adds decision context

opportunities.name: Add Pre-flight Validation
opportunities.description: Agent doesn't validate prerequisites before pipeline execution. Missing config, absent planning artifacts, or wrong project structure surface as mid-pipeline failures with no guidance.
opportunities.impact: First-timer success, CI reliability, clear error recovery paths
opportunities.action: After configuration, add validation step: check config parseable, scan planning_artifacts/epics/, verify Vitest and Playwright available. Print diagnostic with next steps if anything missing.

findings.title: Confused user dead-end
findings.detail: No recovery path for wrong invocation

opportunities.name: Extract Deterministic Operations to Scripts
opportunities.description: Multiple pipeline steps spend LLM tokens on deterministic parsing — config YAML, qa-status.yaml, acceptance criteria extraction, test case counting. Estimated 1800-2600 tokens saved per epic.
opportunities.impact: Token efficiency, consistency, reusability across workflows
opportunities.action: Create Python scripts for: acceptance criteria extraction (highest priority), test case counting, config resolution, state detection. Each outputs structured JSON.

opportunities.name: Add Pipeline Flexibility
opportunities.description: Pipeline is all-or-nothing. Experts can't regenerate a single layer or story. Steps 2+3 could run in parallel since they're independent.
opportunities.impact: Expert efficiency, CI optimization, iterative refinement
opportunities.action: Accept optional layer/story filter args. Parallelize Steps 2+3 (independent outputs from same test plan).

strengths.title: Specification-First Philosophy
strengths.detail: Tests Are the Spec constraint is clearly stated and architecturally sound. Tests drive implementation, not the reverse.

strengths.title: Parallel Execution Model
strengths.detail: Running alongside custom-dev (not after it) enables true TDD at the workflow level.

strengths.title: Resumable Execution
strengths.detail: qa-status.yaml state tracking enables graceful restart across sessions.

strengths.title: Token Efficiency
strengths.detail: 1,866 tokens with zero waste patterns. No defensive padding, no meta-explanation. Every instruction carries weight.

strengths.title: Outcome-Driven Steps
strengths.detail: Each pipeline step opens with a Goal statement describing what to achieve, not how to achieve it.

strengths.title: Concrete Conventions
strengths.detail: File patterns, framework specifics, and example test names prevent drift and ensure consistency.

strengths.title: Clean E2E Delegation
strengths.detail: Delegates Playwright to specialized skill rather than reimplementing E2E generation.

structure.assessment: Sound workflow logic with well-ordered activation and pipeline. State detection enables resumption. Three missing persona sections are the sole structural gap.

findings.title: Non-standard name format
findings.detail: custom-qa doesn't follow bmad-agent-{name} pattern. Intentional for custom workflow suite.

persona.assessment: Consistent technical, imperative tone. Zero waste patterns. Overview establishes mental model in 7 lines. No changes recommended to existing content.

cohesion.assessment: Every step serves the core mission. Zero redundancy. Clean separation between test layers. Without persona sections, behavior in ambiguous situations is undefined.

persona_capability_alignment.notes: No persona defined to align with

efficiency.assessment: Clean dependency graph, no cycles. Main opportunities: parallelize Steps 2+3, add pre-flight validation, make Step 5 incremental. All improvements are additive.

experience.assessment: Functional for guided users, frustrating for first-timers and automators. Easily adaptable to headless mode.

journeys.summary: Invokes qa-to-done without prior context. Hits silent failures if planning artifacts missing. Doesn't understand why tests fail.
Wants to regenerate just E2E tests. Must re-run entire pipeline.
CI system needs machine-readable output. Gets markdown only.
bright_spots: qa-status.yaml is good foundation for state tracking

autonomous.notes: No discovery phase, all inputs deterministic. Low transformation effort to add --headless flag.

scripts.assessment: 6 opportunities totaling 1800-2600+ tokens saved per epic. Highest priority: acceptance criteria extraction. All scripts reusable across custom-dev and sprint planning.

recommendations.action: Add Identity, Communication Style, and Principles sections to SKILL.md
Add pre-flight validation step after configuration
Create acceptance criteria extraction script (Python, outputs JSON)
Create test case counting script (Python, regex-based)
